reasoning: Weighted 5-year LDF = 1.0617. CV_5yr = 0.0316 (very low). CUTOFF at 59 months (reported count): is_monotone_from_59_onward = True (all factors = 1.000 thereafter); CV_59+ = 0.0017 (near-zero); slope_sign_changes = 0. Convergence override applies: all averages at 59-71+ = exactly 1.000 or within ±0.001%, confirming development cessation. Switch to tail methodology for 59+mo intervals; zero tail factor (LDF=1.000) for all subsequent maturities is justified and credible.
